package.name: amr_failover
package.description:
Failover Controller node: arbiter antara SLAM/Nav2 dan Visual Regression.
State machine: SLAM_ACTIVE (default) -> publish /cmd_vel = /cmd_vel_nav VISUAL_FALLBACK -> publish /cmd_vel = /cmd_vel_visual JOY_OVERRIDE -> publish /cmd_vel = /cmd_vel_joy (deadman R1) EMERGENCY_STOP -> publish /cmd_vel = (0, 0)
